items.title: AI: Short Circuit?
items.description: Fiduciary Management highlights market concentration and capex risks in AI-driven tech. Review the complete investment outlook analysis here.

items.title: Brent crude oil price rebounds, Caterpillar hits $300B market cap
items.description: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Tuesday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Oil (CL=F, BZ=F) prices are rallying on geopolitical tensions, with Brent crude oil crossing $65 for the first time since November. Caterpillar (CAT) crossed $300 billion in market capitalization for the first time. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

items.title: The Best Dow Jones Stock Over The Past Year Is In A Buy Zone, Riding AI Boom
items.description: The stock is up 77% over the past 52 weeks, making it the top-performing stock in the Dow Jones Industrial Average in that period.

items.title: Caterpillar Stock Hits This Milestone. Yes, It’s AI.
items.description: Caterpillar  shares were up 1.7% in midday trading at $640.69, while the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average were down 0.2% and 0.6%, respectively.  If Cat stock can close around $641, it will be the first close above $300 billion, according to Dow Jones Market Data.  Cat stock first closed with a market value above $200 billion on Nov. 6, 2024.

items.title: Caterpillar Crosses $300 Billion in Market Value on AI Rally
items.description: Because of its business selling power-generation equipment, Caterpillar has been a runaway winner in a market where investors are hungry for secondary AI plays after the valuations of major technology and semiconductor companies soared.  Exuberance around data-center-driven demand for power generation has helped the company “support a record backlog,” Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Christopher Ciolino said.
